auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.error: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.
auth.login.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.login.confirm_email: Check your inbox to confirm your email, then sign in.
auth.login.already_confirmed: That link was already used or has expired. If you were confirming your email, it's verified — sign in below. If you were resetting your password, request a new link.
auth.login.confirm_missing: That confirmation link was incomplete. Open the link from your email again, or just sign in.
auth.login.confirm_invalid: That confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Try signing in — if that fails, sign up again to get a new link.
auth.forgot.title: Reset your password
auth.forgot.help: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
auth.forgot.sent: If an account exists for that email, a password-reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth.reset.title: Choose a new password
auth.reset.expired: That password-reset link has expired or was already used — request a new one.
auth.reset.error.too_short: The password must be at least 10 characters.
auth.reset.error.failed: The password could not be updated. Request a new reset link and try again.
auth.signup.title: Create your account
auth.onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
auth.invite.title: You have been invited
auth.invite.invalid: This invitation is invalid or has expired.

config.setup.desc: No template is installed yet. Use the guided setup to pick the right template for your business — you review exactly what it sets up before anything is applied.
config.revisions.title: Revision history
config.terms.title: Terminology
config.terms.desc: Rename domain words for your business. Your override wins over the template.

costing.title: {job} costing
costing.detail.title: {job} costing
costing.redacted_note: Labour and margin are hidden for your role.
costing.upsell: Costing is a paid add-on your organisation doesn't have yet. Add it to see cost roll-ups and margins.
costing.qva_upsell: Quote-versus-actual comparison is a paid add-on your organisation doesn't have yet.

digest.title: Daily digest
digest.all_clear: All clear — nothing needs your attention.
digest.upsell: The daily digest is a paid add-on your organisation doesn't have yet. Add it to get the daily summary and exception cards here.
customer_updates.title: Customer updates
customer_updates.form.title: Update details
customer_updates.form.safe_note: Only progress and milestones are shared — never costs, workers, or internal notes.
customer_updates.sent.title: Sent update
customer_updates.share.title: Share with the customer
customer_updates.share.hint: Sending mints a private, revocable link.
customer_updates.share.revoked_or_expire: The link is revoked or expired.
onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.subtitle: Answer a few questions and we prepare a ready-to-use configuration you can review before applying.
onboarding.error.cap: You have reached the setup attempt limit for this organization.
onboarding.error.invalid: That configuration could not be validated — adjust your answers and try again.
onboarding.error.forbidden: You do not have permission to run setup.
onboarding.error.failed: Setup could not start — try again.
onboarding.intake.heading: About your business
onboarding.intake.business_description_p: e.g. We prepare and deliver catering meals for offices — Arabic works too: نجهّز وجبات الضيافة ونوصلها للمكاتب
onboarding.intake.business_description_n: A sentence or two helps us recommend the right template — English or Arabic.
onboarding.intake.job_term_note: Leave blank and the template you pick decides the wording — you can rename it any time in Settings.
onboarding.intake.auto_note: In the smallest currency unit (fils/halalas). Above-limit values are rejected for safety.
onboarding.preview.title: Review your workspace
onboarding.preview.not_confident: Not a confident match — review the options
onboarding.preview.alternatives_note: Choosing a different template prepares a new proposal using the same answers.
onboarding.preview.limitations: What this template does not do
onboarding.preview.template_install_note: Stages, presets, categories, roles and calendar for your work.
onboarding.preview.upgrade_note: These were requested but are not on your current plan — they are not applied.
onboarding.checklist.title: Finish setting up
onboarding.checklist.import: Import your customers, team and items
onboarding.flow.remaining: {count, plural, one {About # short step left} other {About # short steps left}}
onboarding.flow.resume_note: Your answers save automatically — you can leave and pick up where you stopped.
onboarding.flow.error.invalid: Please check the answers on this screen and try again.
onboarding.flow.error.custom_empty: Pick at least one add-on for a custom selection, or choose Free.
onboarding.flow.error.no_draft: We couldn't find your setup answers. Please start again.
onboarding.flow.error.incomplete: Some steps are missing answers — use the edit links to complete them.
onboarding.flow.error.in_progress: Workspace creation is already running. Give it a moment, then refresh this page.
onboarding.flow.error.failed: Something went wrong while creating your workspace. Nothing is lost — your answers are saved. Press the button again to continue from where it stopped.
onboarding.flow.welcome.title: Welcome to IdaraWorks
onboarding.flow.welcome.lead: Answer a few short questions about your business and we'll prepare a workspace that fits the way you actually operate.
onboarding.flow.welcome.point_template: A recommended setup you can review and change
onboarding.flow.welcome.point_plan: Pick how you want to start — Free included, no payment now
onboarding.flow.welcome.point_confirm: Nothing is created until you confirm at the end
onboarding.flow.business.title: About your business
onboarding.flow.business.name: Business name
onboarding.flow.business.name_help: The name your team and customers know. Example: Al Noor Aluminium & Glass.
onboarding.flow.business.legal_name_help: Only if it differs from the everyday name — used on printed documents. You can add it later.
onboarding.flow.business.industry: What field do you work in?
onboarding.flow.business.industry_help: The closest match is enough — you can fine-tune everything later.
onboarding.flow.business.description: Describe what you do, in your own words
onboarding.flow.business.description_hel: One or two sentences is plenty. Example: “We fabricate steel gates and railings to order for villas.” This helps suggest the right starting setup — it never locks you in.
onboarding.flow.region.title: Where you operate
onboarding.flow.region.defaults_note: The time zone and currency are suggested from your country — adjust them if needed.
onboarding.flow.region.language_help: The app switches immediately and supports both English and Arabic — you can change this any time.
onboarding.flow.scale.title: Your team
onboarding.flow.scale.employees: How many people work in the business?
onboarding.flow.scale.users: How many of them will need to sign in?
onboarding.flow.scale.users_help: Field crew sign-ins are free — count everyone who'll open the app.
onboarding.flow.scale.departments: Which areas exist in your business?
onboarding.flow.work.title: How your work runs
onboarding.flow.work.pattern: How does your work usually happen?
onboarding.flow.pattern.project: Defined engagements with a start and finish (builds, fit-outs, installations)
onboarding.flow.pattern.retail: Selling ready products (in store or online)
onboarding.flow.work.intake: How does new work usually reach you?
onboarding.flow.work.workflow: In a line or two, how does a typical piece of work move from start to done?
onboarding.flow.work.workflow_help: Example: “Customer calls → we visit and quote → approval → we do the work → invoice.”
onboarding.flow.needs.title: What you need
onboarding.flow.needs.capabilities: What would you like to manage here?
onboarding.flow.needs.capabilities_help: Pick what matters now — anything can be switched on later.
onboarding.flow.needs.device: Where will your team mostly use it?
onboarding.flow.needs.sharing: Will you share progress updates with your customers?
onboarding.flow.needs.problem: What's the main problem you want to solve?
onboarding.flow.needs.problem_help: In your own words — it helps point you at the right things first.
onboarding.flow.template.title: Your recommended setup
onboarding.flow.template.calls_things: What it calls a unit of work:
onboarding.flow.proposal.title: What will be configured
onboarding.flow.proposal.note: This is a preview — nothing is created or applied until you confirm at the end.
onboarding.flow.proposal.terminology: The words the app will use
onboarding.flow.proposal.term_current: Your unit of work will be called “{term}”.
onboarding.flow.proposal.term_help: Leave blank to keep the suggested word. Plural forms can be refined later in Settings → Configuration.
onboarding.flow.proposal.approvals_note: No approval rules are set up automatically — add them any time in Settings → Approvals.
onboarding.flow.plan.title: Choose how you want to start
onboarding.flow.plan.must_choose: Pick one of the four options to continue — nothing is pre-selected.
onboarding.flow.plan.honesty: No payment is collected now — online payment isn't enabled yet, and your selection is only recorded as your choice. Your workspace starts on the standard 14-day full trial either way, and paid activation happens later through the governed billing activation process.
onboarding.flow.plan.honesty_short: Recorded as your choice only — no payment is collected now.
onboarding.flow.plan.custom_help: Pick individual add-ons — the total updates as you go.
onboarding.flow.branding.title: Make it yours
onboarding.flow.branding.note: Optional — you can add or change all of this later in Settings → Branding.
onboarding.flow.branding.trial_note: Your logo shows everywhere during the trial. On the Free plan, logo display on documents and in the app is part of the branding add-ons — it reverts to your initials until those are active. Your upload is kept either way.
onboarding.flow.branding.logo_drop: Drag an image here, or tap to choose
onboarding.flow.branding.logo_hint: PNG, JPG or WebP, up to 2 MB.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.too_large: The image is larger than 2 MB.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.bad_type: Use a PNG, JPG or WebP image.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.bad_signa: The file doesn't match its type — please export it again.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.too_small: The image is too small — at least 32×32 pixels.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.too_large: The image is too large — at most 2000×2000 pixels.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.bad_image: The image could not be read. Try a different file.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.invalid_i: The upload could not be saved. Please try again.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.session: Your sign-in expired. Please log in again.
onboarding.flow.branding.error.failed: The upload failed. Please try again.
onboarding.flow.branding.footer_hint: Shown at the bottom of printed documents — address, phone, tax number.
onboarding.flow.review.title: Review & create your workspace
onboarding.flow.review.renamed_note: You renamed it — your word replaces the template's own everywhere.
onboarding.flow.review.branding_skipped: Skipped — add it any time in Settings → Branding.
onboarding.flow.review.confirm_explain: Pressing the button will: create your workspace, apply the {template} setup (stages, words, roles), record your plan choice, and save your branding. Nothing has been created yet — this is the moment it happens.
onboarding.flow.review.resume_note: Your workspace was created but setup didn't finish. Press the button below to finish the remaining steps — nothing will be duplicated.
imports.title: Imports
imports.subtitle: Bring in your customers, team and items from a spreadsheet.
imports.csv: Paste CSV (first row is the header)
imports.csv_note: Common column names are recognised automatically. Nothing is created until you apply.
export.title: Export your data
export.help: Download your organisation's data as CSV. Files open in Excel or Google Sheets.
branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Your logo and identity across the app and printed documents — managed in one place.
branding.logo.title: Logo
branding.logo.hint: PNG, JPEG or WEBP up to 2 MB, between 32×32 and 2000×2000 pixels.
branding.logo.drop: Drag and drop your logo here, or tap to choose a file
branding.logo.empty: No logo uploaded yet — your initials are shown instead.
branding.accent.title: Accent colour
branding.identity.title: Identity
branding.identity.display_name_hint: Shown in the app header and on printed documents.
branding.identity.footer_hint: Address, tax registration, contact — printed at the bottom of documents.
branding.error.too_large: The image is larger than 2 MB.
branding.error.bad_type: Only PNG, JPEG or WEBP images are accepted.
branding.error.bad_signature: The file content does not match its declared type.
branding.error.bad_image: The image could not be read.
branding.error.too_small_dims: The image is too small — at least 32×32 pixels.
branding.error.too_large_dims: The image is too large — at most 2000×2000 pixels.
branding.error.quota_exceeded: Storage limit reached — free up space or add storage.
branding.error.invalid: Some fields are invalid — check the accent colour and field lengths.
branding.error.failed: The change could not be saved. Please try again.
branding.gate.title: Where your branding appears
branding.gate.app_on: In the app: your logo shows in the header.
branding.gate.app_off: In-app placements (header logo) are locked — included with the in-app branding add-on at {price} per month.
branding.gate.docs_on: On documents: your logo and footer details print on quotes, invoices and purchase orders.
branding.gate.docs_off: Document placements (quotes, invoices, purchase orders) are locked — included with the document branding add-on at {price} per month.
branding.gate.fallback: While a placement is locked, your organisation-name initials are shown instead of the logo.
nav.locked_hint: Locked — available with an add-on or a higher plan
nav.create.title: New
dashboard.welcome.title: Welcome to your workspace
dashboard.welcome.body: Everything is ready. Here are good first steps.
dashboard.deadlines_empty: Nothing due in the next two weeks.
dashboard.locked_money: This area is a paid add-on your organisation doesn't have yet.
dashboard.foreman_empty_body: When a manager assigns you to a {job}, it appears here.
subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.impersonation_active: A support session is currently active on your workspace.
subscription.notice.error: That action could not be completed.
subscription.cancel_at_period_end: Your subscription will end at the period end.
subscription.activation_unavailable: Paid subscriptions aren’t available yet — you can keep using your workspace on the current plan.
subscription.indicative_pricing: Prices are indicative and not final.
subscription.cancel_help: Your workspace stays available and exportable during the notice period.
subscription.confirm.body: Please confirm — this changes your subscription and the monthly total.
subscription.confirm.cancel_body: This requests cancellation: your subscription ends at the period close and paid add-ons stop then. Your workspace stays on the free base and your data is never deleted.
subscription.monthly_total_note: Prices exclude VAT and are indicative until final pricing is confirmed.
subscription.trial_note: When the trial ends your workspace continues on the free base — your data is never deleted.
subscription.notice.addon_removed: Add-on removal scheduled for the end of the billing period. Your data is never deleted.
subscription.notice.bundle_removed: Bundle removal scheduled for the end of the billing period. Your data is never deleted.
subscription.free_base.title: Always included — free
subscription.addon.remove_note: Removes at period end — your data is never deleted.
subscription.addon.coming_later: Not yet available — cannot be purchased
subscription.strip.recorded: Selected at onboarding (activates via billing when available)
subscription.tier.field_seats_free: Field seats are always free and unlimited
subscription.tier.free_pitch: The permanent free base — run daily operations without the paid modules.
subscription.tier.free_note: Always included, on every workspace — your data is never deleted.
subscription.tier.custom_pitch: Build your own set from the individual add-ons — pay only for what you use.
subscription.tier.custom_note: Selecting an add-on you already have through a bundle never charges twice.
subscription.tier.change_note: Upgrade any time — additions apply immediately. Downgrades and removals apply at the end of the billing period, and your data is never deleted.
subscription.tier.no_payment_now: No payment is collected now — paid activation opens later, and prices stay indicative until then.
locked.explain: {name} is a paid add-on that isn't active on your workspace yet.
locked.ask_admin: Ask your workspace owner or admin to activate it from the subscription page.
locked.unavailable: This capability isn't available yet and can't be purchased.
